name: n8n-nodes-testneo
description: Official TestNeo community node — agent-run ingest, post-agent verification (PASS/BLOCK), and release outcome recording. Same REST contracts as the TestNeo n8n HTTP templates.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && npm run copy:assets
scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/nodes/TestNeo && cp nodes/TestNeo/*.svg dist/nodes/TestNeo/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: npm run lint && npx --yes tsx --test test/executionStatus.test.ts && npm run build
